content:
It will be great to run Miri in CE directly, without having to jump from/to the Playground, and taking advantage of other niceties CE has like subwindows for multiple examples etc.

Most importantly, it allows passing arguments to Miri!

Example: comparing SB vs. TB: https://godbolt.org/z/PT3E3KeP1

https://github.com/compiler-explorer/compiler-explorer/issues/2563
https://github.com/compiler-explorer/compiler-explorer/pull/7718
